name: JSON Schema Validator
description: Validate data against a JSON schema using pure Python type checking, required field verification, enum validation, pattern matching, and min/max constraints. No external dependencies.

data.description: Data to validate: either an inline object or a string path to a JSON file

schema.description: JSON Schema object to validate against

valid.description: Whether the data is valid against the schema

assumptions: Schema follows JSON Schema draft-07 conventions (subset)
If data is a string path, the file contains valid JSON
